segments.text: Early game reads with bair, bringing it back to neutral!
segments.original_text: 通っています最初の読み合い空中後ろでニュートラルゲームに戻すスマホ

segments.text: And now the projectile exchange begins—neutral game is on!
segments.original_text: さあ弾を撃ち合って様子見の時間が始まるが
ダッシュアタックでの果敢な切り込み

segments.text: But it gets shut down by the neutral special!
segments.original_text: しかしそれはニュートラル必殺技で飛ばされる

full_text: Early game reads with bair, bringing it back to neutral! And now the projectile exchange begins—neutral game is on! A bold dash attack! But it gets shut down by the neutral special! Whoa? Oh!
